rag_rules: Use AGREE syntax: assume/guarantee for contracts, eq for equations, const for constants, and assign for output bindings
Place component type contracts in type scopes and implementation contracts in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) and implication for clear contract expressions
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope; do not invent declarations
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
Use conditional expressions (if-then-else) for clear branching logic in equations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators for clear contract expressions
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not invent declarations for unresolved references; use exact visible identifiers
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names (use int, real, bool instead)
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
